'''nadhoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoadult|pseudoadult]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoadult|pseudoadult]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nadhoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædheseth|nædheseth]] || [[word:nædhesej|nædhesej]] || [[word:nædhesesh|nædhesesh]] || [[word:nædhese|nædhese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhodhosoth|nadhodhosoth]] || [[word:nadhodhosoj|nadhodhosoj]] || [[word:nadhodhososh|nadhodhososh]] || [[word:nadhodhoso|nadhodhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhosoth|nadhosoth]] || [[word:nadhosoj|nadhosoj]] || [[word:nadhososh|nadhososh]] || [[word:nadhoso|nadhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhofsoth|nadhofsoth]] || [[word:nadhofsoj|nadhofsoj]] || [[word:nadhofsosh|nadhofsosh]] || [[word:nadhofsof|nadhofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadhosotho|nadhosotho]] || [[word:nadhosojo|nadhosojo]] || [[word:nadhososho|nadhososho]] || [[word:nadhosoko|nadhosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadhosoth|nadhosoth]] || [[word:nadhosoj|nadhosoj]] || [[word:nadhososh|nadhososh]] || [[word:nadhoso|nadhoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadhosothol|nadhosothol]] || [[word:nadhosojol|nadhosojol]] || [[word:nadhososhol|nadhososhol]] || [[word:nadhosokol|nadhosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadhosothotho|nadhosothotho]] || [[word:nadhosojojo|nadhosojojo]] || [[word:nadhososhosho|nadhososhosho]] || [[word:nadhosoko|nadhosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadhosothon|nadhosothon]] || [[word:nadhosojon|nadhosojon]] || [[word:nadhososhon|nadhososhon]] || [[word:nadhosokon|nadhosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadhosothoro|nadhosothoro]] || [[word:nadhosojoro|nadhosojoro]] || [[word:nadhososhoro|nadhososhoro]] || [[word:nadhosokoro|nadhosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
